title: miquelia umbellata
intro: Miquelia umbellata is a species of flowering plant in the family Cephalotaceae, commonly known as a type of tree fern or rock fern. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Miquelia umbellata include its potential to treat various ailments such as skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that may help in reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Miquelia umbellata can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams for medicinal use.
